name: Defense Unicorns (UDS Core / Zarf)
summary: Defense Unicorns builds UDS Core (Istio/Keycloak/NeuVector/Pepr), Zarf airgap delivery, uds-cli, and runs Warhacker 2026 (San Diego, June 16-19). Andrew Greene's Option-A endorsement: 'It'd be awesome to see a running deployment of what you've built.'
killinchu_fit: Killinchu is UDS-deployable by construction: it ships as a Zarf package, deploys into UDS Core airgapped, and emits cosign-attested receipts on the exact supply-chain surface DU's engineers (eddiezane/Zarf, brandtkeller/SBOM-provenance, AustinAbro321/UDS-Core) build. The szl-warhacker meta-bundle v0.4.0 was built in direct response to Greene's ask.
hooks: UDS Zarf airgap deploy (recipe-uds-deploy) on UDS Core
cosign attestation chain aligned to brandtkeller's falco-zarf + SBOM-provenance work
Mission P2/P4 live kind deploy of the uds-mesh bundle
